symptom_summary: MacBook fails to boot after update, showing Apple logo briefly then black screen consistently.
most_probable_cause: Corrupted macOS installation or system files from failed update
reproduction_steps: Observe Apple logo appears for few seconds
Screen goes black and remains unresponsive
diagnosis_steps_taken: Force restart attempted with same results
priority_reason: Device completely unusable, user cannot access system or data
recommended_resolution: Try Safe Mode boot, then macOS Recovery with First Aid, escalate to depot repair if Recovery Mode inaccessible
